description: Fundamentals of programming using Python. Topics include variables, control flow, functions, data structures, and basic algorithms.
Study of fundamental data structures (arrays, linked lists, trees, graphs) and algorithm design techniques (sorting, searching, dynamic programming).
Principles of OOP including encapsulation, inheritance, polymorphism, and design patterns using Java and C++.
Relational database design, SQL, normalization, indexing, transactions, and introduction to NoSQL databases.
Software development lifecycle, agile methodologies, requirements engineering, testing strategies, and project management.
Introduction to programming concepts through JavaScript, including variables, control flow, functions, arrays, and DOM basics.
Core data structures and algorithmic problem solving using C++, focusing on arrays, linked lists, stacks, queues, and trees.
Algorithmic thinking, complexity analysis, recursion, sorting, searching, and dynamic programming implemented in Python.
OOP principles, class design, inheritance, polymorphism, interfaces, generics, and exception handling using Java.
Introduction to software engineering practices, version control, teamwork, documentation, and basic project workflows.
Build modern web applications with TypeScript, modular architecture, component-based design, and frontend integration.
Advanced software design with reusable patterns, refactoring techniques, code quality principles, and maintainable architecture.
Computer organization fundamentals, memory concepts, pointers, structures, and low-level programming with C.
Client-server application development using JavaScript across frontend and backend layers, including API integration.
Relational database concepts, entity-relationship modeling, SQL basics, and normalization principles.
